swapMintAmounts(uint256,uint256,uint256,.details: Given a budget `maxAmountIn`, returns the actual deposit consumed,      LP minted, and fee. Iterates inside `LMSRStabilized.swapAmountsForMint`      using post-state b for round-trip safety with burnSwap.

burnSwapAmounts(uint256,uint256,uint256,.notice: Calculate the amounts for a burn swap operation (pure)

mintAmounts(uint256,uint256,uint256[]).notice: Calculate the proportional deposit amounts required for a given LP token amount

swapMintAmounts(uint256,uint256,uint256,.notice: Exact-in quote for a single-token swap-mint (pure).
